issues.message: [implicit-any] Parameters implicitly typed as any weaken type safety
Added explicit parameter and return types for clarity

data.explanation: The file used implicit any on parameters. Adding number types documents intent and enables better checking.
data.whatChanged: - Typed parameters `a` and `b` as `number`\n- Added explicit `: number` return type
data.whyChanged: Removes implicit any, aligns with strict TypeScript style, and matches typical utility helper expectations.
data.improvementSummary: Stronger typing with no behavior change.
